statement: Under the tested TC01/EX01 setup, the Ordo implementation achieved higher admitted composite scores than the instruction-only implementation, with the clearest advantage in branch-heavy and restore/backtrack scenarios.
scope: TC01 Complex Multi-Step Process / EX01 New Office Opening / five paired historical scenarios in Evidence Base v1.3 only.
limitations: Historical model and runtime configuration provenance is incomplete for some runs.
Composite scoring weights are method version 1 and are not universal.
The claim must not be generalized to other task classes or production readiness.
